attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
TVOUTPUT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SO_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
COALESCE(TVOUTPUT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,'=') AS SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE,
COALESCE( MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC 
ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DATE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_START_DTM ,
TVOUTPUT.SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_END_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.CREATE_DATETIME,
TVOUTPUT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME,
TVOUTPUT.DUTY_BILLING_CD,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND TT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM (  
SELECT
                BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
                SO_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
                SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG, 
                START_TV_DATE,
                SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_START_DTM,
                SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_END_DTM,
                DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,
                CREATE_DATETIME,
                UPDATE_DATE_TIME,
                DUTY_BILLING_CD,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY                  
		BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,                    
		SO_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,                    
		SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG
        ORDER BY UPDATE_DATE_TIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM  
                FROM 
                                                (
                                SELECT
                                                ELSOT.NAME BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
                                                ELSOT.DESCRIPTION SO_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
                                                ELSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,
                                                CAST (ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
                                                CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_START_DTM,
                                                ELSOT.END_DATE_ACTIVE SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_END_DTM,                                             
                                                CASE WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-AUS'),4))='-AUS' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-AUS'))
                                                                WHEN (SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- AUS'),5))='- AUS' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- AUS'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-JPN'),4))='-JPN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-JPN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- JPN'),5))='- JPN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- JPN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-CAN'),4))='-CAN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-CAN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- CAN'),5))='- CAN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- CAN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-NL'),3))='-NL' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-NL'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- NL'),4))='- NL' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- NL'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-US'),3))='-US' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-US'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- US'),4))='- US' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- US'))
                                                                ELSE
                                                                ELSOT.NAME         END DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,                                    
                                                ELSOT.CREATE_DATETIME,
                                                ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME,
                                                ELSOT.DUTY_BILLING_CD
                                                FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ELSOT
                                                    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
													ELSOT.NAME 
													ORDER BY ELSOT.GLOBAL_NAME  DESC)=1

                                                WHERE ELSOT.NAME IS NOT NULL AND                                     
												ELSOT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' 
												AND ORG_ID NOT IN(SELECT SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT   WHERE MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG='Y')
                                                AND ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'WF_W_SALES_ORDER_TYPE')
                                                UNION ALL
                                SELECT
                                                ELSOT.NAME BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, 
                                                ELSOT.DESCRIPTION SO_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
                                                ELSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,
                                                CAST (ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
                                                CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_START_DTM,
                                                ELSOT.END_DATE_ACTIVE SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_END_DTM,                                             
                                                CASE WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-AUS'),4))='-AUS' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-AUS'))
                                                                WHEN (SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- AUS'),5))='- AUS' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- AUS'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-JPN'),4))='-JPN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-JPN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- JPN'),5))='- JPN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- JPN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-CAN'),4))='-CAN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-CAN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- CAN'),5))='- CAN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- CAN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-NL'),3))='-NL' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-NL'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- NL'),4))='- NL' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- NL'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-US'),3))='-US' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-US'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- US'),4))='- US' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- US'))
                                                                ELSE
                                                                ELSOT.NAME         END DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,                                    
                                                ELSOT.CREATE_DATETIME,
                                                ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME,
                                                ELSOT.DUTY_BILLING_CD
                                                FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ELSOT
                                                                QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
                                                                                                                                                ELSOT.NAME                                         
                                                                ORDER BY ELSOT.GLOBAL_NAME  DESC)=1
                                                WHERE                                                 
												ELSOT.NAME IS NOT NULL AND                                     
												ELSOT.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' AND 
												ORG_ID NOT IN(SELECT SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT   WHERE MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG='Y') AND 
                                                NOT EXISTS 
                                                (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ELSOT1 where ELSOT1.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' AND ELSOT1.NAME=ELSOT.NAME)             AND                      
                                                ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'WF_W_SALES_ORDER_TYPE')
                                                
                                                UNION   ALL         
                                                
                                                SELECT
                                                ELSOT.NAME BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, 
                                                ELSOT.DESCRIPTION SO_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
                                                CASE WHEN ELSOT.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE ='ORDER'  AND NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG      IS NOT NULL 
                                                                THEN NSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG                                                ELSE ELSOT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,

                                                CAST (ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
                                                CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_START_DTM,
                                                ELSOT.END_DATE_ACTIVE SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_END_DTM,                                             
                                                CASE WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-AUS'),4))='-AUS' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-AUS'))
                                                                WHEN (SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- AUS'),5))='- AUS' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- AUS'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-JPN'),4))='-JPN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-JPN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- JPN'),5))='- JPN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- JPN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-CAN'),4))='-CAN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-CAN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- CAN'),5))='- CAN' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- CAN'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-NL'),3))='-NL' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-NL'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- NL'),4))='- NL' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- NL'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-US'),3))='-US' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-US'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- US'),4))='- US' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- US'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-BR'),3))='-BR' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'-BR'))
                                                                WHEN(SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- BR'),4))='- BR' THEN
                                                                                                SUBSTR(ELSOT.NAME,0,INDEX(ELSOT.NAME,'- BR'))
                                                                ELSE
                                                                ELSOT.NAME         END DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,                                    
                                                ELSOT.CREATE_DATETIME,
                                                ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME,
                                                ELSOT.DUTY_BILLING_CD
                                                FROM (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES WHERE NAME IS NOT NULL AND                                                GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG' AND ORG_ID IN(SELECT SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT   WHERE MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG='Y') )ELSOT
                                                LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV NSOT                                                
                                                ON ELSOT. NAME = NSOT. BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME 
                                                QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY                                                                                                                                       ELSOT.NAME                                                                                                         ORDER BY ELSOT.GLOBAL_NAME  DESC)=1




                                                WHERE




                                                ELSOT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'WF_W_SALES_ORDER_TYPE')
                                                UNION ALL
                                                SELECT                
                                                NSAT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
                                                NSAT.SO_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
                                                NSAT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,
                                                NSAT.START_TV_DATE,
                                                NSAT.SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_START_DTM, 
                                                NSAT.SO_TYPE_ACTIVE_END_DTM,
                                                NSAT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME,
                                                NSAT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME,
                                                NSAT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME UPDATE_DATE_TIME,
                                                NSAT.DUTY_BILLING_CD
                                                FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV NSAT
                                                WHERE END_TV_DATE = CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
                                                AND BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME IN
                                                (SELECT NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES  WHERE UPDATE_DATE_TIME >
                                                (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'WF_W_SALES_ORDER_TYPE') )
                                                )
                                                TVINPUT
										QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY                                       
										TVINPUT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,                                   
										TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE                                 
										ORDER BY TVINPUT.UPDATE_DATE_TIME desc) = 1
                ) TVOUTPUT
                LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV TT
                                                ON TVOUTPUT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = TT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
                                                AND TT.END_TV_DATE = CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
                WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
